mundo.titulo: Henry Zeffman: Andy Burnham offers a blueprint for his premiership
mundo.resumen: Burnham offered a sense of what his time as prime minister would mean, but he did not lay out many details.

mundo.titulo: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
mundo.resumen: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

mundo.titulo: The Good Life actress Dame Penelope Keith dies aged 86
mundo.resumen: Tributes are paid to the "comic genius", who starred in some of Britain's most popular sitcoms.

mundo.titulo: Five dead in shooting at youth welfare centre in northern Germany
mundo.resumen: Two people have been arrested, one of whom is the suspected shooter, police say.

mundo.titulo: US Supreme Court rejects Trump's appeal of E Jean Carroll's sexual abuse case
mundo.resumen: The decision means the US president will now have to pay her the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she'd been awarded.

mundo.titulo: One in 10 children in England referred for mental healthcare - with anxiety the main reason
mundo.resumen: Demand is soaring beyond capacity, meaning children in England wait years for help with various conditions.

negocios.titulo: Supreme Court blocks Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook
negocios.resumen: The decision, seen as a win for central bank independence, sends the fight over removal back to the lower courts.

negocios.titulo: British American Tobacco to cut 9,000 jobs
negocios.resumen: The company had said earlier this year it was planning savings to make it  "more digital and AI-focused".

negocios.titulo: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
negocios.resumen: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.

negocios.titulo: South Korea unveils $880bn chip and AI investment plan
negocios.resumen: It comes as regional rivals like Taiwan, China and Japan are investing heavily in chip factories and other technology.

negocios.titulo: Inspired by Wimbledon and the World Cup? Here's how to play sport for free
negocios.resumen: As the world's best players begin play at Wimbledon, how can you get into sport on a budget.

negocios.titulo: Rogue builder left our roof leaking and spent £30K we gave him in Lanzarote
negocios.resumen: Christian Williams benefitted to the tune of £160,000 from offending - but had just £1 to pay back.

tecnologia.titulo: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
tecnologia.resumen: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

tecnologia.titulo: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
tecnologia.resumen: Pocket sells a $129 credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do items.

tecnologia.titulo: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
tecnologia.resumen: Flipper Device's new Busy Bar will retail for $249.

tecnologia.titulo: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
tecnologia.resumen: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

tecnologia.titulo: California law targeting loud streaming ads takes effect on July 1
tecnologia.resumen: Streaming ads might be getting a lot quieter.

tecnologia.titulo: Ford rehires ‘gray beard’ engineers after AI falls short
tecnologia.resumen: "Mistakenly we thought that by just introducing artificial intelligence ... that would produce a high-quality product.”

tecnologia.titulo: Let him cook: How Weber Blackstone CEO Roger Dahle went from upstart to the biggest name in grilling
tecnologia.resumen: It’s time for our annual Fourth of July grill episode here at Decoder. This is when we invite the CEOs of outdoor cooking companies onto the show to explain just how their businesses kind of look like every other business. And this is a very special edition.  Today I’m talking to Roger Dahle, the CEO […]

tecnologia.titulo: Rocket Lab is buying Iridium’s satellite network for $8 billion to take on SpaceX
tecnologia.resumen: Rocket Lab, the space company best known for its small satellite launcher Electron, has announced plans to acquire Iridium Communications for $8 billion. The deal will combine Rocket Lab's launch services and spacecraft manufacturing with Iridium's satellite-based communications network, putting it in a better position to challenge SpaceX. tecnologia.titulo: The Flipper Zero creators’ Busy Bar productivity display will go on sale next month
tecnologia.resumen: First announced over a year ago in April 2025, the Busy Bar will be available for purchase starting on July 14th when the device also starts shipping. Created by the same team behind the Flipper Zero wireless multitool, the Busy Bar is instead described as a "productivity multitool" that relies on a pixelated LED display […]

tecnologia.titulo: How to end a TV show
tecnologia.resumen: Ending any story is hard, but that's especially true of mystery-packed TV shows. Series like Lost initially hook viewers with constantly building secrets and questions, to the point that they can often seem incomprehensible. But the promise is that it will all pay off in the end - a feat that few shows ultimately manage. […]

Comcast has announced plans to separate itself into two publicly traded companies, spinning off its NBCUniversal and Sky broadcasting arms. The shake up aims to protect the media conglomerate's profitable broadband and wireless brand, which will retain the "Comcast" company name, as its media and entertainment business - now collectively named "NBCUniversal" - faces increasing […]

tecnologia.titulo: The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it
tecnologia.resumen: A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there's still time to fight it. On May 29th, the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued a 412-page proposal to revise federal financial assistance. The language is a combination of distinctly Trumpian attacks on "woke" policies and […]
